appliedUpdates.description: Added a dedicated `Flow Validator Guidance: docs` section so preflight-review-and-merge-gate packet/governance assertions have an explicit document-surface validation playbook alongside the existing API guidance.

environmentConstraints: The delegated `user-testing-flow-validator` helper still fails immediately with `Invalid model: custom:CLIProxyAPI-5.4-high`, so this round used the approved direct in-session fallback.

The compose-backed runtime still reports `503 {"status":"DOWN"}` on `http://localhost:9090/actuator/health`; validation readiness was judged from the milestone endpoints on `8081` instead of actuator health.
